component.name: SectionCard
component.script:
sub init() m.bg = m.top.findNode("cardBg") m.poster = m.top.findNode("cardPoster") m.title = m.top.findNode("cardTitle") m.focused = false end sub
function itemContent() as Object return m.top.itemContent end function
sub onItemContentChange() content = m.top.itemContent if type(content) = "roInvalid" then return m.title.text = content.title posterUrl = content.hdGridPosterUrl if type(posterUrl) = "roString" and posterUrl <> "" m.poster.uri = posterUrl end if end sub
sub onFocusChange() if m.top.focusPercent > 0.5 m.bg.color = "0x1A1A40FF" m.title.color = "0x00FFFFFF" else m.bg.color = "0x0E0E22FF" m.title.color = "0xB0B0C0FF" end if end sub
